sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 무디스 2025년 3분기 MCO·MIS 분기 최고 매출 — MCO 20억 달러(+11%), 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 3분기 MCO 매출 20억 달러(+11%)로 분기 사상 최고치를 경신, MIS도 11억 달러(+12%)로 신기록을 달성했다.
강한 실적에 힘입어 2025년 연간 조정 희석 EPS 가이던스를 14.50~14.75달러로 상향 — 중간값 기준 전년 대비 약 17% 성장을 목표로 제시했다.
연초 대비(YTD) MCO 매출은 58억 달러(+8%)를 기록, 이익 엔진의 확장성과 EPS 두 자릿수 성장이 지속되고 있다.

businessChanges.text: MA의 ARR은 34억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8%(+2억 6,000만 달러) 성장, 반복매출이 전체 MA 매출의 96%를 차지하며 구독 전환이 가속화됐다.
KYC 부문 Decision Solutions ARR은 16% 급성장, Decision Solutions 전체도 ARR +10%로 MA 세그먼트 내 고성장 동력으로 부상했다.
MA 거래성 매출은 구독 기반 전략 전환의 영향으로 19% 감소했으나 반복매출 강세로 전체 성장세는 유지됐다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 MCO 매출 20억 달러(+11%), MA 9억 900만 달러(+9%), MIS 11억 달러(+12%).
연초 대비 MCO 58억 달러(+8%), MA 27억 달러(+9%), MIS 32억 달러(+6%).
MA ARR 34억 달러(+8%), 반복매출 비중 96%, 유기적 고정환율 기준 반복매출 +8%.

watchItems.text: 상향된 2025년 연간 가이던스(조정 희석 EPS 14.50~14.75달러) 달성 여부와 4분기 MIS 채권 발행 환경 변화를 다음 실적에서 확인해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a3q25earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document MOODY'S CORPORATION REPORTS RESULTS FOR THIRD QUARTER 2025 NEW YORK, NY - October 22, 2025 - Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) today announced results for the third quarter 2025 and updated select metrics within its outlook for full year 2025 1 . THIRD QUARTER SUMMARY FINANCIALS Moody’s Corporation (MCO) Revenue Moody’s Analytics (MA) Revenue Moody’s Investors Service (MIS) Revenue 3Q 2025 3Q 2025 3Q 2025 $2.0 billion ⇑ 11% $909 million ⇑ 9% $1.1 billion ⇑ 12% YTD 2025 YTD 2025 YTD 2025 $5.8 billion ⇑ 8% $2.7 billion ⇑ 9% $3.2 billion ⇑ 6% MCO Diluted EPS MCO Adjusted Diluted EPS 2 MCO FY 2025 Projected 1 3Q 2025 3Q 2025  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.0 billion = 20억 달러; $909 million = 9억 900만 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $5.8 billion = 58억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $2.0 = 2.0달러; $909 = 909달러; $5.8 = 5.8달러; $13.15 = 13.15달러; $14.75 = 14.75달러; $13.40 = 13.40달러; $10.26 = 10.26달러; $11.30 = 11.30달러; $14.50 = 14.50달러.

growth and significant operating leverage. The investments we’ve made to capitalize on several deep currents are paying off – enabling us to better serve our customers while giving us the financial flexibility to pursue key growth opportunities. Our results, once again, speak for themselves: significant margin expansion, strong top-line growth, and clear momentum.” Rob Fauber President and Chief Executive Officer “Our financial performance this quarter was exceptional, with MCO and MIS revenue reaching record highs. We have a powerful earnings engine delivering double-digit EPS growth and generating significant free cash flow, all while investing for growth. We’re raising our guidance, most notably, our adjusted diluted EPS 2 to be in the range of $14.50 to $14.75 1 , which represents 17% year-over-year growth at the midpoint.” Noémie Heuland Chief Financial Officer 1 Guidance as  Normalized numeric aliases: $14.50 = 14.50달러; $14.75 = 14.75달러.

Decision Solutions, 7% in Research and Insights and 9% in Data & Information. • Recurring revenue, comprising 96% of total MA revenue, grew 11% on a reported and 8% on an organic constant currency basis 2 . • Transaction revenue declined by 19%, reflecting MA’s ongoing strategic shift towards subscription-based solutions. • Foreign currency translation favorably impacted MA’s revenue by 2%. • Revenue grew 9%, or 7% on an organic constant currency basis 2 , versus the prior-year period, with a favorable foreign currency impact of 1%. • Recurring revenue grew 11% on a reported and 8% on an organic constant currency 2 basis. • ARR 3 of $3.4 billion increased $260 million, representing 8% growth versus September 30, 2024. • Decision Solutions ARR 3 grew 10%, including 7% in Banking, 8% in Insurance and 16% in KYC. Research & Insights and Data & Information ARR 3 grew 8% and 7%,  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $260 million = 2억 6,000만 달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $260 = 260달러.
